assertions.reason: Browser-mode validation of the invalid Gist ID error is blocked because the live app surface fails closed with 'ViboGit desktop backend is unavailable. Launch via Tauri runtime.' and the available browser-safe mock preview does not wire `sync_beacon_validate_gist` or any inline error state. I verified the Shared Gist ID field is rendered and editable in the reachable Sync Beacon settings UI, but could not trigger a real user-visible invalid-ID error without the Tauri backend.

Blocked in browser mode. The real browser app cannot reach the Sync Beacon panel because the app stops at the desktop-backend error screen, and the only reachable browser-safe preview route includes Sync Beacon settings captures but no Sync Beacon remote-machines panel capture or seeded remote machine data. As a result, local-machine exclusion and remote machine rendering could not be exercised through the user surface.

Blocked for the same browser-only limitation as VAL-BEACON-022: there is no reachable remote-machines Sync Beacon panel with seeded ahead counts in browser mode, so the ahead>0 indicator and exact commit-count display could not be validated through the UI.

In browser mode, the actual app shell at http://localhost:4158 is not fully navigable to all changed sections because it hard-stops on the desktop-backend connection error screen. I could only reach Sync Beacon settings via the dedicated figma-capture preview route, not through the actual app navigation. The AI Settings section is represented in that preview route as well, but the Sync Beacon remote machines panel is not reachable there. Therefore the requirement that all new/changed sections be reachable via actual UI navigation is not met on the browser surface.

frictions.description: The shared browser dev surface renders a full-screen backend connection error before any in-app navigation is available. To inspect browser-safe UI, I had to use the existing /figma-capture/screens preview route.
frictions.resolution: Used the preview route only to validate renderable browser-safe Sync Beacon settings UI.

frictions.description: The preview route exposes Sync Beacon settings captures but does not include a seeded Sync Beacon remote-machines panel capture or mock send handlers for Sync Beacon actions.

blockers.description: Actual browser app at http://localhost:4158 cannot navigate beyond the backend error state because it requires Tauri runtime availability.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified the error state directly and attempted browser-only navigation alternatives; app still gated on missing backend.

blockers.description: No browser-reachable remote-machines panel with seedable machine data was available in the preview route, preventing validation of local-machine exclusion and ahead-count indicators.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected the preview route, related source files, and rendered DOM for any reachable remote-machines panel capture; none was present.

blockers.description: Invalid-Gist-ID error handling could not be triggered in browser mode because Sync Beacon validation depends on backend send handlers not present in the preview surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Confirmed the Gist ID field is editable in the preview and attempted browser-only form-state manipulation, but no validation path or inline error surfaced without backend wiring.
